response.justification: Bogdan has strong experience in distributed systems, cloud infrastructure (Node.js, AWS CDK, Kubernetes), and leadership (mentoring, CI/CD, TDD practices), but lacks direct C++ experience at scale and cloud architecture depth. His background is diverse but not heavily focused on large-scale compute platforms or cloud compute technologies, which are core to this role.
strengths: Extensive experience with distributed systems and real-time data processing (e.g., micro-services handling millions of requests/sec)
Proven leadership in mentoring, TDD, and engineering best practices (e.g., Refactoring Dojos, Selenium courses)
Experience with Kubernetes, cloud-native development, and scalable architectures (e.g., GISCollective, Optilyz)
concerns: Insufficient direct experience with C++ at the required scale (8+ years) or hardware architecture
Limited production-level cloud architecture experience balancing short- and long-term needs
No explicit experience with large-scale compute technologies or storage hardware architecture
